title: The House on the Cliff
author: Barış Kısır
description: The Harrison family moves into their dream home: a stunning glass-walled house on the California cliffs. But the house was built by Elias Voss, a charismatic cult leader who buried something beneath the foundation. When Kate discovers old blueprints showing a sealed chamber, she begins to unravel a fifty-five-year-old murder. Her husband Mark insists she let it go. The house itself seems to push back. As Kate digs deeper, she must confront the buried truth before the house claims another victim.
short_description: A family's dream house on the California cliffs hides a cult leader's dark secret buried beneath the foundation.

characters.name: Kate Harrison
characters.description: 38-year-old mother of two, former investigative journalist. Sharp, intuitive, restless. She discovers the truth beneath the house and pursues justice against her husband's wishes.

characters.name: Mark Harrison
characters.description: 42-year-old tech executive, Kate's husband. Pragmatic, image-conscious, deeply invested in the narrative of their perfect life. He opposes Kate's investigation to protect his career and reputation.

characters.name: Ezra Vance
characters.description: 87-year-old architect who designed the house for Elias Voss. Carried the secret of the buried chamber for five decades. Provides Kate with the key and his confession.

characters.name: Elias Voss
characters.description: Charismatic cult leader who founded the Sun Temple commune. Built the house on the cliff and buried his first disciple alive beneath the foundation. Died in Chile in 1998, never prosecuted.

characters.name: Miriam Cross
characters.description: 24-year-old woman, Voss's first disciple and lover. Buried alive beneath the house in 1969. Her remains are discovered by Kate, triggering the investigation.

characters.name: Sarah Harrison
characters.description: Kate and Mark's 10-year-old daughter. Sensitive and artistic. The first to sense the presence in the house.

characters.name: Carol
characters.description: Former Sun Temple member who witnessed Miriam's burial. Comes forward to testify after 55 years of silence.

characters.name: Detective Garcia
characters.description: Lead detective investigating the Miriam Cross case.

long_description: The Harrison family moves into their dream home: a stunning glass-walled house on the California cliffs. But the house was built by Elias Voss, a charismatic cult leader who buried something beneath the foundation. When Kate discovers old blueprints showing a sealed chamber, she begins to unravel a fifty-five-year-old murder. Her husband Mark insists she let it go. The house itself seems to push back. As Kate digs deeper, she must confront the buried truth before the house claims another victim.
